sources.expression: $wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT * FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_strings` AS ics WHERE `id`= %d',  intval( $id ) ), ARRAY_A )
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT * FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_string_translations` AS ics WHERE `string_id`= %d',  intval( $id ) ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT ict.id, ict.string_id, ict.language, ict.status, ics.context FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_string_translations` AS ict LEFT JOIN `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_strings` AS ics ON ict.string_id = ics.id WHERE ics.context = %s', $context  ) )
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT meta_id, meta_key, post_id FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'postmeta` WHERE meta_key = %s',  $key) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT * FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'postmeta` WHERE post_id = %d AND meta_key = %s', intval( $post_id ), $key) )

sinks.expression: $wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT * FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_strings` AS ics WHERE `id`= %d',  intval( $id ) ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT ict.id, ict.string_id, ict.language, ict.status, ics.context FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_string_translations` AS ict LEFT JOIN `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'icl_strings` AS ics ON ict.string_id = ics.id WHERE ics.context = %s', $context  ) )
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT meta_id, meta_key, post_id FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'postmeta` WHERE meta_key = %s',  $key) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( 'SELECT * FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'postmeta` WHERE post_id = %d AND meta_key = %s', intval( $post_id ), $key) )

wp_die(
				esc_html__( 'You must be logged in.', 'elementskit-lite' ),
				401
			)

				403
			)
